subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested refactoring the code to make it easier to follow by separating the logic into a separate function do_mark_free_pages(). Proposed using an if-else statement to determine whether to use the zone-level list or the SPB lists.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes a change to the hibernate function mark_free_pages() to account for the new superpageblock (SPB) rework in the Linux kernel. The current implementation walks the buddy allocator's free lists, but after SPB, free pages live on per-superpageblock free lists instead of zone-level free lists. This patch wraps the existing per-page walk in an SPB iteration loop and falls back to the zone-level list if there are no SPBs.
